entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Students copy passages from their books. (Alveary Copywork & Dictation Books provide selected passages).

This topic is included in the following course(s): Language Study: Grade 8

rows.label: Language Study: Grade 8
days: Dictation: Grade 8*Grammar/Comp: Grade 8*Written Narration: Grade 8*Copywork: Grade 8

entries.content:
Permission to print for non-commercial use. See Alveary group use policy to use lessons
in a group context.

LINKS: Click text or scan the QR code in the top corner of the lesson plan pages to view
online resources associated with the lessons.

Responsibility for previewing all links rests with the teacher. All links were checked at the
time of publication; however, websites change frequently and may contain objectionable
content. Please report broken links by contacting us through our website.

lessons.title: 10m Copywork: Grade 8 - Lesson 1
lessons.body:
⍞ Materials: Grade 8 Student packet of copywork and dictation passages 
⬚ ⬚ ⬚ ⬚ ⬚ 

➜ Spend ten minutes daily working on copywork this week. You can use this week's suggested passage or choose your own of a similar length.

terms.content:
· Write 4 lines of poetry or a passage from memory in your best penmanship.

· Share your Copywork Journal with an adult.

· Write 4 lines of poetry or a passage from memory in your best penmanship.

· Share your Copywork Journal with an adult.
